## 🔧 Remaining Actions for User

### Step 1: Update GitHub Repository Description

**Go to:** https://github.com/ranjrana2012-lab/project-chimera/settings

**Copy this description:**
```
AI-powered live theatre platform creating performances that adapt in real-time to audience input. Open-source for universities and theatre companies.
```

**Website URL:**
```
https://ranjrana2012-lab.github.io/project-chimera/
```

**Topics (comma-separated):**
```
ai, theatre, live-performance, sentiment-analysis, real-time, microservices, fastapi, python, docker, adaptive-systems, education, university, open-source, machine-learning
```

### Step 2: Verify GitHub About Section

After updating, verify:
- [ ] Description appears on repository page
- [ ] Topics show as colored badges
- [ ] Website URL is clickable
- [ ] No grant files visible in repository

### Step 3: Re-add Confirmed Contributors (Later)

Once students provide consent:
1. Create `CONTRIBUTORS.md` with confirmed contributors
2. Update "Acknowledgments" section in README.md
3. Add `.github/CODEOWNERS` file for contribution recognition
